name: Fishing World
author: Poki
description: Fishing World is the ultimate fishing adventure! Cast your line, reel in rare and unique fish, and upgrade your gear to become the best angler out there. Explore new waters, buy better boats, and level up your skills as you unlock exciting new locations. Can you catch them all and become a fishing legend? How to play Fishing World? Move: WASD or the arrow keys Fish: F or left click Who created Fishing World? Fishing World is created by Panda Pasha Games. Play their other games on Poki: Survival Island , Prison Punch and Blacksmith Tycoon ! How can I play Fishing World for free? You can play Fishing World for free on Poki. Can I play Fishing World on mobile devices and desktop? Fishing World can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
